headline: ARTY Soared 33% in 2026 While BOTT and ROBO Lag: Which Humanoid Robot ETF to Buy
summary: Humanoid robots have moved beyond assembly lines. AI-powered machines are being trialed for legal research, financial analysis, and front-line customer service, pushing automation into work historically considered safe from displacement. AI-powered robotics is moving from factory floors into legal research, financial analysis, and customer service. Three exchange-traded funds offer different angles on that shift: the ...
